conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'm planning the testing strategy for our frontend. I need to pick between Cypress, Playwright, and Selenium for end-to-end tests.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Selenium is old and slow, crossing it off immediately.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Cypress is great for single-page apps but has limited support for multiple browser tabs and cross-origin scenarios, which we need.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Playwright handles multi-tab flows natively and supports all major browsers.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For unit tests I'll stick with Vitest regardless.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: For E2E: Playwright. The multi-origin support is a hard requirement for our OAuth flows.

query: What end-to-end testing framework did the user decide on?
